text: A photograph of a building facade, likely a temple or religious structure. The lower section is a light-colored, textured wall, possibly stucco or concrete blocks, featuring faint, repeating decorative carvings. Above the wall is a red decorative cornice. The upper section is a dark, enclosed balcony or window area, where a large, dark, ornate structure, possibly a bell or statue, is visible. To the right, a portion of a red-tiled roof and a vertical red pipe are visible. The image is heavily backlit by the sun, creating a bright lens flare.
